# Compositional semantics

## Compositionality

- [Stanford encyclopedia of Philosophy entry on Compositionality](https://plato.stanford.edu/entries/compositionality/)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Q2N-FELAih0?si=q1kq_WjGDwGjkm56" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/ZWP6Sv2_8c8?si=IApzT8TyrwdU_yfl" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Predicates and their arguments
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/2XuoMl927a0?si=CprCAm5Ha8gDEL5P" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/HN_4_QkUIXA?si=FPLuxU7YeapGY73b" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/0pYjX13QsKY?si=Gpn8ZaXxmTCO5Gkw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
(We do not do currying in our class, so this is relevant up to 10:47)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Bx_bzxdBp2A?si=NUT1C1bw5cqXmdeH" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Background on relations and functions 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/qxRIcuHWX4U?si=htjcMERWQFq9qElH" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
